overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a sleek, dark corporate facility from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring the Arasaka corporation branding. The camera moves through a futuristic lobby, down a long illuminated corridor, and alongside a panoramic window revealing an overgrown rock face with waterfall. The atmosphere is moody and cyberpunk with artificial lighting and neon accents.

events.description: begins walking forward from the 3rd floor lobby area
exits lobby and enters the long corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through the Arasaka building lobby on the 3rd floor, passing the reception seating area

entered.detail: large white illuminated text reading 3RD FLOOR hanging from ceiling
bioluminescent red coral-like decorative structure in white planter
modern white curved sofa against the right wall
illuminated green digital display panel on the left wall
large rectangular overhead light panels illuminating the space

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a sleek, dark corporate lobby with prominent 3RD FLOOR signage overhead. A red glowing bioluminescent plant sits in the foreground near white modern seating, while green digital displays line the left wall. The camera begins walking forward, leaving the lobby area.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corporate hallway with illuminated branding

events.description: enters long corridor with large illuminated Arasaka signage on left wall
passing under sequential overhead strip lights creating rhythmic illumination patterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sleek dark corridor, passing the illuminated Arasaka corporate logo on the left wall

entered.detail: large backlit corporate logo sign spelling ARASAKA in white letters on dark wall
series of suspended linear light fixtures running down the corridor ceiling
metal elevator doors lining the right side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a long, narrow corporate corridor characterized by the prominent illuminated Arasaka signage on the left wall. The space is dimly lit by overhead strip lights reflecting off the polished dark floor. Elevator doors line the right wall as the camera progresses steadily forward through the futuristic hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: observation gallery with panoramic window overlooking overgrown structure

events.description: approaches large panoramic window revealing overgrown rock face with waterfall and dense vegetation
green ambient light from exterior vegetation becomes the dominant illumination source

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the panoramic window while observing the overgrown rock formation, waterfall, and abandoned structure visible through the glass

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass wall revealing exterior overgrown environment
large rocky cliff face covered in moss and vegetation visible through window
water cascading down the rock face visible through the glass
metal doorway embedded in the rock face with stairs leading up
dense vines and foliage hanging down in front of the window

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into an observation gallery featuring a massive panoramic window revealing a striking contrast between the sterile corporate interior and a lush overgrown rock face outside. Dense vegetation, hanging vines, and a waterfall are visible through the glass, bathed in green natural light. The camera moves along the window, showcasing the abandoned metal doorway embedded in the mossy rock wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile, dark corporate interior that eventually opens into a view of a lush, overgrown natural landscape. It begins in a sleek lobby, passing a red bioluminescent plant and white modern seating as the camera moves forward past green digital displays and 3RD FLOOR signage. The scene then shifts into a long, narrow corridor where the camera progresses steadily past illuminated Arasaka signage and reflective dark floors lined with elevator doors. As the hallway ends, the space expands into an observation gallery, transitioning from artificial dimness to the vibrant green light of a massive panoramic window. The camera finally glides along the glass, revealing a striking contrast between the corporate facility and a mossy rock face featuring hanging vines, a waterfall, and an abandoned metal doorway.
